TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Finland, title = Finland, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Finland} }

S.FORM: pasaviri aicu a vinlan a kunian tua awciu/iyurupu (Europe) i tua kaviriyan.
S.PHON: pasaviri aiʦu a vinɭan a kunian tua awʦiu/ijurupu (əurupə) i tua kavirijan.
S.FORM: pasaviri aicu a vinlan a kunian tua awciu/iyurupu (Europe) i tua kaviriyan.
S.PHON: pasaviri aiʦu a vinɭan a kunian tua awʦiu/ijurupu (əurupə) i tua kavirijan.
